title: Shut Up Dead Entities
description: A client-side mod that smoothly fades out mob sounds upon death or despawn. Eliminates lingering noises from Creepers, Endermen, and Nether portal.
body:
# ShutUpDeadEntities

A lightweight client-side mod that adds smooth audio fading to entities upon death or removal.

### Key Features

- **Natural sound fading**. Mob sounds (idle, hurt, or death) now fade out linearly when the entity dies or despawns, preventing harsh audio cuts.

- **Lingering Audio Fixes**. Prevents specific issues where sounds (like Endermen screams or Creeper hisses) continue to play after the mob is gone.

- **Nether Portal Sound Fix**. The portal trigger noise now fades out naturally if you step out of the portal before teleporting.

### Technical Details

- **Client-side only**. No server-side installation required. Works on all multiplayer servers.
- **Compatibility**. Designed to work with the vanilla sound system and most modded entities.
